title: The Locked Office
content: Employees arrived Monday morning to discover that one office door refused to open. The electronic lock displayed an unusual error message, and no one could access important project documents inside. While technicians inspected the system, coworkers debated various explanations. Eventually, the building manager discovered that the lock's battery had completely drained during the weekend, preventing it from recognizing access cards. After replacing the battery, the door opened immediately. The incident reminded everyone that even advanced technology sometimes fails because of surprisingly simple causes.
